# Prompt 25 - Project Review

# Enterprise Space Mission Data & AI Platform

> **Phase 25 - Final Project Review**

Read `.github/prompts/_shared.prompt.md` first. This is a **review/synthesis** phase.

---

# Objective

You are acting as Technical Program Manager and Principal Architect. Produce the final review across all 24 phases.

---

# Critical Rules

- Assess only delivered work; honest gaps; no new features.

---

# Tasks

1. Outcomes vs objectives per phase.
2. Architecture & quality assessment.
3. KPIs & metrics achieved.
4. Lessons learned.
5. Risks & technical debt.
6. Cost/resource review (16 GB fit).
7. Roadmap & next steps.
8. Portfolio readiness checklist.
9. Trade-offs & 5 ADRs.
10. Executive summary & glossary.

---

# Deliverables

```
docs/review/ 01-outcomes.md ... 09-adr.md 10-glossary.md README.md
```

# Acceptance Criteria

All phases reviewed, risks + roadmap + portfolio checklist complete.

# Definition of Done

The project is presentable as a complete enterprise portfolio. Final phase — stop.
